item.title: Towing a Truck After Service Hours Run Out
item.description: A roadside recovery operation involving a truck that requires towing after mechanical issues occur outside regular service hours. The focus is on safe handling, timing, and coordinated recovery work. What part of roadside recovery do you find most critical?

media:content.media:title: Towing a Truck After Service Hours Run Out
media:content.media:description: A roadside recovery operation involving a truck that requires towing after mechanical issues occur outside regular service hours. The focus is on safe handling, timing, and coordinated recovery work. What part of roadside recovery do you find most critical?

item.title: Jeep Can't Decide!
item.description: A Jeep recovery situation unfolds as the team works through the rescue process with the right towing and recovery equipment. The focus is on safe, practical vehicle recovery in real-world

item.title: Big Load, Bigger Challenge, Watch This Tow Get
item.description: A heavy tow takes a technical approach as the recovery team works through a challenging load with the right equipment and careful handling. It’s a practical look at real-world towing and recovery

item.description: A forklift rollover recovery where the first plan did not work, requiring a different approach to complete the job. The focus is on the recovery process and the equipment used in the field. What

item.description: A recovery operation in stormy conditions, using towing and rescue equipment to manage a tricky roadside situation. Real-world field work with careful positioning and recovery steps. How would you

item.title: Sand-Filled Semi Recovery
item.description: A sand-filled semi creates a challenging recovery scenario as weight, shifting material, and terrain make the operation slow and precise.

media:content.media:title: Sand-Filled Semi Recovery
media:content.media:description: A sand-filled semi creates a challenging recovery scenario as weight, shifting material, and terrain make the operation slow and precise.

item.title: Semi vs SUV Recovery on a Slippery Road
item.description: A semi and SUV end up in a slippery-road recovery situation, with the focus on the rescue process and the equipment used to clear the scene. It’s a real-world look at roadside recovery work under

item.title: Over the Limit, Under the Bridge Recovery
item.description: A vehicle caught under a low bridge requires a careful recovery due to height restrictions and tight clearance.

media:content.media:title: Over the Limit, Under the Bridge Recovery
media:content.media:description: A vehicle caught under a low bridge requires a careful recovery due to height restrictions and tight clearance.

item.title: No More Mud Baths for This Little Tractor
item.description: A small tractor stuck in deep mud is recovered and returned to solid ground after a messy off-road situation.

media:content.media:title: No More Mud Baths for This Little Tractor
media:content.media:description: A small tractor stuck in deep mud is recovered and returned to solid ground after a messy off-road situation.

item.title: Semi Truck Blocking Bridge Construction
item.description: A stranded semi blocks active bridge construction, creating delays and requiring careful coordination to clear the site safely

media:content.media:title: Semi Truck Blocking Bridge Construction
media:content.media:description: A stranded semi blocks active bridge construction, creating delays and requiring careful coordination to clear the site safely

item.title: Semi Truck Teeters on Bridge After Crash
item.description: A semi truck left dangerously unstable after a crash requires urgent stabilization to prevent a potential fall from the bridge.

media:content.media:title: Semi Truck Teeters on Bridge After Crash
media:content.media:description: A semi truck left dangerously unstable after a crash requires urgent stabilization to prevent a potential fall from the bridge.

item.title: Truck Runs Off Road, Hits Two Cars, Nearly Hits House
item.description: A severe roadside incident escalates as a truck leaves the roadway, colliding with vehicles and narrowly avoiding a nearby house.

media:content.media:title: Truck Runs Off Road, Hits Two Cars, Nearly Hits House
media:content.media:description: A severe roadside incident escalates as a truck leaves the roadway, colliding with vehicles and narrowly avoiding a nearby house.
